name: Moza AirCross 2 Professional Kit
description: Moza's AirCross 2 Professional Kit includes the AirCross 2 gimbal with all its standard accessories plus an iFocus-M Wireless Lens Motor, Arca-Swiss Quick Release Plate, and a shoe-mount Phone Holder.

features.Key Features: AirCross 2 Gimbal, iFocus-M Motor | Arca Swiss QR Plate, Phone Holder | 7 lb Payload | Angled Motor Arm for Clear Camera View | Portrait/Landscape Mode Switchable | Up to 12-Hour Runtime | 3-Latch Balance Locking System | 3 x CAN Ports for Motors/Accessories | iOS/Android Moza App | One-Touch Auto-Tuning AI Calculation | Show Less
features.What’s in the box?: Moza AirCross 2 3-Axis Handheld Gimbal Stabilizer (Black) | Battery | Quick Release Plate | Quick Release Baseplate | Mini Tripod | Lens Support | Lens Support Screw | 3/8"-16 Camera Mount Screw | M3C-Mini Cable | M3C-C Cable | USB-C Cable | MCSC-C1 Cable | MCSC-Remote Cable | MCSC-Multi/C Cable | M3C-Micro Cable | Follow Focus Support Rod | L-Bracket | Tool Box | EPP Case | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty | Moza AirCross 2 3-Axis Handheld Gimbal Stabilizer (Black) | Battery | Quick Release Plate | Quick Release Baseplate | Mini Tripod | Lens Support | Lens Support Screw | 3/8"-16 Camera Mount Screw | M3C-Mini Cable | M3C-C Cable | USB-C Cable | MCSC-C1 Cable | MCSC-Remote Cable | MCSC-Multi/C Cable | M3C-Micro Cable | Follow Focus Support Rod | L-Bracket | Tool Box | EPP Case | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty | Moza iFocus-M Wireless Lens Motor | 3.5mm Multi-CAN Cable | Lens Gear | Limited 3-Month Manufacturer Warranty | Moza AirCross 2 Arca-Swiss Quick Release Plate | 1/4"-20 Camera Mounting Screw | Limited 3-Month Manufacturer Warranty | Moza Shoe Mount Smartphone Holder | Limited 3-Month Manufacturer Warranty
